transcription.text: I love your nervous smile, your giant heart, and knowing what melts you. The irresistibly smooth chocolate of Lindor, made to melt the one you love this Valentine's.

segments.text: I love your nervous smile, your giant heart, and knowing what melts you.
The irresistibly smooth chocolate of Lindor, made to melt the one you love this Valentine's.

metadata.title: 2024 Lindt Lindor Milk Chocolate Truffles Valentine's Day: Love Notes
